title: Anthropic API key mismatch — keychain stale post CHG-0139 rotation
cause: API key rotated (CHG-0139) but macOS Keychain entry anthropic-api-key not updated. Gateway works via OpenClaw config. All diagnostic scripts and agent heartbeats (Aria/Shield/Lex/Sage) returning HTTP 401.
impact: outage-detect, health-check, agent heartbeats all failing. Standby mode active. Fallback chain broken. Gateway + main session unaffected.
resolution: Batch close — incident resolved, post-mortem complete or superseded. Closed by Yoda with Ken approval 2026-05-11.
actionRequired: Ken to run: security add-generic-password -U -s anthropic-api-key -a anthropic -w <NEW_KEY>
